title: Comparettia carinata
taxonomy: Comparettia carinata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Comparettia and is a type of terrestrial orchid. The species is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. Comparettia carinata is further classified as a member of the subtribe Catasetinae, which is a group of orchids characterized by their unique flower structure. The plant's classification is well-documented in botanical literature and is widely recognized in the scientific community.
